description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a light wood frame and a tall, rectangular headboard featuring three vertical cutout slits. The bed is topped with a neatly made, light-colored sheet or comforter, and two pillows are positioned side by side at the head. The frame is simple and boxy, with clean lines and no visible footboard. The headboard is constructed from the same light wood as the rest of the frame, giving the bed a cohesive and minimalist appearance. The bedding appears soft and slightly textured, contrasting with the smooth, hard surface of the wooden frame. The overall design is functional and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or residential settings.
description: A modern platform bed with a light wood frame, tall slotted headboard, and neatly made light bedding with two pillows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full headboard with three vertical slits, two pillows, and the neatly made bedding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bed's low platform frame, the thickness of the mattress, and the depth of the headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tall, rectangular headboard with three vertical cutouts and the edge of the mattress barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the platform frame, mattress, and headboard depth.
